languages.text: {n}Попытки перевода странных надписей приводят лишь к тому, что корпус {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Толкователя{/g} перегревается, а {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинный дух{/g} устройства начинает жалобно гудеть.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Попытки перевода странных надписей приводят лишь к тому, что корпус {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Толкователя{/g} перегревается, а {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинный дух{/g} устройства начинает жалобно гудеть.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Attempts to translate the strange inscriptions only lead to the {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} casing overheating — the device's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} begins to buzz plaintively.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Попытки перевода странных надписей приводят лишь к тому, что корпус {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Толкователя{/g} перегревается, а {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинный дух{/g} устройства начинает жалобно гудеть.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Attempts to translate the strange inscriptions only lead to the {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} casing overheating — the device's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} begins to buzz plaintively.{/n}
{n}Attempts to translate the strange inscriptions only lead to the Elucidator casing overheating — the device's machine spirit begins to buzz plaintively.{/n}
{n}Attempts to translate the strange inscriptions only lead to the Elucidator casing overheating — the device's machine spirit begins to buzz plaintively.{/n}

languages.text: {n}奇妙な文字を翻訳しようとすると、エリュシデーターの筐体が過熱してしまう。機械の魂が悲しそうに唸り始める。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Attempts to translate the strange inscriptions only lead to the Elucidator casing overheating — the device's machine spirit begins to buzz plaintively.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}奇妙な文字を翻訳しようとすると、エリュシデーターの筐体が過熱してしまう。機械の魂が悲しそうに唸り始める。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los intentos de traducir las extrañas inscripciones solo hacen que la carcasa del {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Dilucidador{/g} se sobrecaliente. El {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritu máquina{/g} del dispositivo emite un zumbido quejumbroso.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Attempts to translate the strange inscriptions only lead to the {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} casing overheating — the device's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} begins to buzz plaintively.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los intentos de traducir las extrañas inscripciones solo hacen que la carcasa del {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Dilucidador{/g} se sobrecaliente. El {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritu máquina{/g} del dispositivo emite un zumbido quejumbroso.{/n}

languages.text: {n}翻译那些奇怪铭文的尝试，使得{g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}阐释器{/g}外壳过热——装置的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}发出嗡嗡作响的哀鸣。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Attempts to translate the strange inscriptions only lead to the {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} casing overheating — the device's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} begins to buzz plaintively.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}翻译那些奇怪铭文的尝试，使得{g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}阐释器{/g}外壳过热——装置的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}发出嗡嗡作响的哀鸣。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Jeder Versuch, die seltsamen Inschriften zu übersetzen, führt zu einer Überhitzung des {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidators{/g} ... dessen {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeist{/g} anklagend zu summen beginnt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Attempts to translate the strange inscriptions only lead to the {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} casing overheating — the device's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} begins to buzz plaintively.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Jeder Versuch, die seltsamen Inschriften zu übersetzen, führt zu einer Überhitzung des {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidators{/g} ... dessen {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeist{/g} anklagend zu summen beginnt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tuhaf yazıtları çevirme girişimleri yalnızca {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Aydınlatıcı'nın{/g} kasasının aşırı ısınmasına yol açıyor. Cihazın {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhu{/g}, acıklı bir şekilde vızıldamaya başlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Attempts to translate the strange inscriptions only lead to the {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} casing overheating — the device's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} begins to buzz plaintively.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tuhaf yazıtları çevirme girişimleri yalnızca {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Aydınlatıcı'nın{/g} kasasının aşırı ısınmasına yol açıyor. Cihazın {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhu{/g}, acıklı bir şekilde vızıldamaya başlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vos multiples tentatives de traduction des inscriptions ne font que provoquer la surchauffe du boîtier de l'{g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}élucidateur{/g}, dont l'{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprit de la machine{/g} se met soudain à bourdonner en protestation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Attempts to translate the strange inscriptions only lead to the {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} casing overheating — the device's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} begins to buzz plaintively.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vos multiples tentatives de traduction des inscriptions ne font que provoquer la surchauffe du boîtier de l'{g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}élucidateur{/g}, dont l'{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprit de la machine{/g} se met soudain à bourdonner en protestation.{/n}
